sourcesContent:
export const colors = {
  navy: '#0a1628',
  navyMid: '#112040',
  navyLight: '#1a2d4f',
  gold: '#c9a84c',
  goldLight: '#e8d5a3',
  goldDark: '#a07c28',
  white: '#f5f5f5',
  whitePure: '#ffffff',
  grayLight: '#e8e8e8',
  grayMid: '#999999',
  textBody: '#2c2c2c',
  sectionAlt: '#f9f8f5',
  success: '#3f8f6b',
  borderSoft: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)',
  shadowSoft: 'rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.12)',
};

export default colors;
